headline: Enphase Energy Expands Commercial Microinverter Deployments Across the United States
summary: FREMONT, Calif., April 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH), a global energy technology company, today announced expanded shipments of commercial microinverter products from its U.S. manufacturing facilities. These products, including IQ9N-3P™ and IQ8P-3P™ Commercial Microinverters, reflect the growing installer demand for a simpler, more reliable alternative to traditional string inverters in the commercial solar market. The IQ9N-3P Commercial Microinverter is Enphas
